summary: Tested customer auth (backend + frontend). 15/15 pytest backend cases passed. Frontend register/login/dashboard/logout/protected-route/terms flows all functional. One minor UX inconsistency observed on second logout redirect.

integration_issues.issue: On repeat login→logout cycle, second logout landed on /customer/login rather than / (landing). First logout worked correctly. Likely race: setUser(false) triggers RequireAuth Navigate to /customer/login before navigate('/') resolves. Consider ordering navigate('/') before setUser(false), or making logout navigate synchronously.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description/aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y)

action_items: (Minor) Ensure logout always lands on landing page — reorder navigate('/') before setUser(false) in AuthContext.logout, or await navigate before state update.
(Minor) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to Terms Dialog to remove Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: cookies set with samesite='none' + secure=True is correct for cross-site; however localStorage token is also used — dual storage OK for portability.
AuthContext.checkAuth: if user starts as null and later becomes false, initial loading UI is fine.
server.py grows large (~650 lines) but under 700 threshold; consider splitting auth routes into a separate module for maintainability.
Password hashing uses bcrypt (verified via test); no plain text leaked in /auth/me response.
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all customer/box queries.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all core flows pass; one minor redirect edge case)

test_credentials: Tests create unique users per run (TEST_User_<uuid>). Pre-existing test user tranvanb@test.com / test123 / 0901234567 also available.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates a fresh customer with random email/phone; not cleaned up (harmless test data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend auth is solid. Frontend register flow requires clicking read-terms button to enable checkbox (verified). Bearer token stored in localStorage and also httpOnly cookie set. Only outstanding minor issue is logout redirect race in AuthContext; not blocking.
